items.situation: a student returning a too-small sweater at a store counter

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I bought this sweater last week, but it's way too small. I'd like to return it for a refund, if that's okay.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure, no worries. Do you happen to have the receipt?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh no, I think I tossed it. Is that a problem?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Without the receipt I can't give a cash refund, but I can offer store credit, or swap it for a bigger size right now.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm. Actually, I really love this color, and I saw a large on the rack near the door.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Perfect. Grab the large and bring it over, and I'll sort out the exchange.

questions.stem: Why does the woman come to the counter?

options.A: To return a sweater that doesn't fit
options.B: To complain about a damaged sweater
options.C: To ask where the sweaters are displayed
options.D: To buy a sweater in a new color

questions.explanation: 女士开口就说毛衣太小，想退货拿回钱，所以A正确。B错：她从未说毛衣有破损，只是尺码不合，属于wrong_topic。C错：她不是来问陈列位置，她已经买过了，属于wrong_topic。D错：她最初目的是退货而非购买新颜色，方向相反，属于reversed_situation。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Demand a cash refund from the clerk
options.B: Leave the store to find her receipt
options.C: Pick up a larger sweater from the rack
options.D: Choose a sweater in a different color

questions.explanation: 店员建议换大码，女士说她喜欢这个颜色而且门口货架上看到有大码，店员让她去拿，所以C正确。A错：没有收据无法现金退款，店员已明确拒绝，属于rejected_option。B错：她说收据已经丢了，并未打算回去找，属于unrelated_next_step。D错：她明确说喜欢这个颜色，不会换别的颜色，属于over_inference。

items.situation: two students talking about a houseplant one is caring for

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, how's that little fern doing that you're watching for your roommate while she's home?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, not great. The leaves are turning brown at the tips and I have no idea why.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh! That usually means it's getting too much direct sun. Where do you keep it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Right on the windowsill, where the afternoon sun hits it for hours.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's the problem. Ferns like shade. Move it to your bookshelf away from the window and it should bounce back.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Okay, good call. I'll shift it over there tonight.

questions.stem: According to the woman, why are the fern's leaves turning brown?

options.A: It has not been watered enough
options.B: It is getting too much direct sunlight
options.C: The room is too cold for it

questions.explanation: 女士说叶尖变褐通常是因为晒太多直射阳光，所以B正确。A错：对话从未提到浇水不足，属于related_but_not_stated。C错：没有提到房间太冷，属于related_but_not_stated。D错：没有提到需要更大的花盆，属于related_but_not_stated。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do tonight?

options.B: Buy a new fern for his roommate
options.C: Return the fern to his roommate
options.D: Move the fern away from the window

questions.explanation: 女士建议把蕨类移到远离窗户的书架上，男士说"好主意，今晚就挪过去"，所以D正确。A错：问题是阳光太强而非缺水，他不会改浇水，属于unrelated_next_step。B错：没有任何买新蕨类的想法，属于over_inference。C错：室友还在家，他在帮忙照看，没说要还回去，属于unrelated_next_step。

items.situation: two friends recommending a podcast or TV series to each other

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: You have to try this history podcast I found. Each episode is only twenty minutes, so it's perfect for the bus.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Twenty minutes? That's my whole commute. What's it actually about, though?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Forgotten inventions, mostly. It's narrated really well, but I'll admit some episodes drag in the middle.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hmm. I've been meaning to swap my true-crime show for something I can learn from, actually.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Then this is ideal. Start with episode four on the printing press; it's the strongest one by far.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Episode four, got it. I'll queue it up for tomorrow morning.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: How long the man's daily commute is
options.C: A podcast the woman recommends to the man
options.D: Which episode was the hardest to follow

questions.explanation: 整段对话围绕女士向男士推荐一档历史播客展开，所以C正确。A错：通勤时长只是顺带提到的细节，并非主旨，属于too_narrow。B错：真实犯罪节目只被一带而过，对话并未讨论它为何流行，属于wrong_topic。D错：他们没有讨论哪集最难懂，只提到第四集最强，属于too_narrow。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the man's listening habits?

options.A: He currently listens to true-crime content
options.B: He has already heard episode four
options.D: He never listens during his commute

questions.explanation: 男士说想把他的真实犯罪节目换成能学到东西的内容，说明他目前在听真实犯罪类，所以A正确。B错：他说要明早再听第四集，显然还没听过，属于rejected_option。C错：他主动表示有意尝试这档历史播客，并不讨厌历史，属于over_inference。D错：他说二十分钟正好是他通勤时长，说明他通勤时会听，属于over_inference。

items.situation: two friends coordinating a weekend beach trip

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: So, are we still on for the beach on Saturday? I checked, and it's supposed to be sunny all day.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely! But Saturday morning I have a dentist appointment, so can we leave after lunch?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Sure, that works. Should we take your car or the train?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Let's drive. The train doesn't stop near the beach, and we'd have to walk forever with all our stuff.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good point. I'll bring the umbrella and snacks, then.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: And I'll grab a cooler with some drinks. This is going to be great.

questions.stem: Why do the speakers decide to drive instead of taking the train?

options.A: The train tickets are too expensive
options.B: The train is running late on Saturday
options.C: The man enjoys driving to the coast
options.D: The train does not stop near the beach

questions.explanation: 男士说火车不在海滩附近停，他们得拎着东西走很远，所以D正确。A错：对话没有提到票价，属于related_but_not_stated。B错：没有提到火车晚点，属于wrong_detail。C错：他选择开车是因为火车不方便，而非因为喜欢开车，属于related_but_not_stated。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Saturday morning?

options.A: The weather will probably be rainy
options.B: The man will be busy until after lunch
options.C: The woman will buy train tickets
options.D: They will arrive at the beach early

questions.explanation: 男士说周六上午有牙医预约，要求午饭后再出发，可推断他上午一直忙到午饭后，所以B正确。A错：女士说全天晴朗，不会下雨，属于reversed_situation。C错：他们决定开车而非坐火车，不会买火车票，属于rejected_option。D错：他们午饭后才出发，不可能很早到海滩，属于over_inference。

items.situation: two students comparing how they get to campus — bike, bus, or walk

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'm so tired of waiting for the campus shuttle every morning. It's always packed and never on time.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Why not bike? I ride in every day and it takes me less than ten minutes from the east dorms.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'd love to, but I don't own a bike, and buying one sounds expensive.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, you don't need to buy one. The student center rents them by the semester for almost nothing.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Wait, seriously? That changes everything. Where exactly do I sign up?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Just go to the front desk at the student center. Bring your ID and they'll set you up.

questions.stem: What is the woman's main concern at the start of the conversation?

options.A: The campus shuttle is unreliable and crowded
options.B: Bikes are too expensive for students to buy
options.C: The east dorms are far from campus
options.D: The student center closes too early

questions.explanation: 女士一开口就抱怨校园班车总是拥挤又不准时，这是她最初的烦恼，所以A正确。B错：自行车贵是后面才提到的次要顾虑，并非开头的主要问题，属于too_narrow。C错：东宿舍是男士骑车的起点，与女士无关，属于wrong_topic。D错：对话从未提到学生中心关门太早，属于wrong_topic。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Keep taking the crowded campus shuttle
options.B: Buy a brand-new bike from a store
options.C: Go to the student center to rent a bike
options.D: Start walking to campus every morning

questions.explanation: 男士说学生中心可按学期低价租自行车，到前台带上学生证即可办理，女士非常感兴趣并问在哪报名，所以她最可能去学生中心租车，C正确。A错：她正是因为厌倦班车才在寻找替代方案，不会继续坐班车，属于rejected_option。B错：她觉得买车太贵，且男士说不必买，属于rejected_option。D错：对话从未提到步行上学，属于unrelated_next_step。
